title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kia India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
